nasb.text: So Eleazar the priest took the bronze censers which the men who were burned had offered, and they hammered them out as a plating for the altar,

esv.text: So Eleazar the priest took the bronze censers, which those who were burned had offered, and they were hammered out as a covering for the altar,

cnv.text: 於是，以利亞撒祭司把被火焚燒的人獻過的銅香爐拿起來，叫人錘成薄片，用來包蓋祭壇，

ccb.text: 于是，以利亚撒祭司取来被烧死之人所献的铜香炉，叫人打成薄片用来包祭坛，
